original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: British Thoracic Society Clinical Statement on chronic cough in adults
original_registry_entry.population: Adults with chronic cough lasting more than 8 weeks.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Primary and specialist assessment of chronic cough.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for adult chronic cough assessment and referral; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_sections.heading: Scope and definition of chronic cough
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines chronic cough in adults as cough lasting more than 8 weeks and sets the statement scope.

exact_sections.heading: Clinical history and examination
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports cough duration and character, sputum, smoking, medicines, occupation and environment, wheeze, rhinitis, heartburn, functional and mood impact, and face-to-face upper-airway, ear and chest examination.

exact_sections.heading: Basic investigations and referral
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports chest radiography, spirometry with reversibility, sputum testing where infection is suspected, selected inflammatory markers, specialist referral for persistent or unclear cough, and upper-airway specialist assessment when indicated.

title: British Thoracic Society Clinical Statement on chronic cough in adults
population: Adults with chronic cough lasting more than 8 weeks.
intended_setting: Primary and specialist assessment of chronic cough.
access_limitations: One or more PDF tables require structured extraction
Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
